svg.text: HOW AN INTEGER LOSES ITS HISTORY

text.font-family: 'Helvetica Neue Condensed', 'Arial Narrow', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Two ways to forget, and they agree
Each arrow discards information: 3.6 bits → 2.6 → 0, and 3.6 → 1.6 → 0.

text.font-family: 'Helvetica Neue Condensed', 'Arial Narrow', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: ℹ zero bits at the last corner is the Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic
